description: Identifies missed AWS Organizations consolidated billing, Reserved Instance/Savings Plans sharing, commitment planning, and cost governance opportunities while requiring billing scope and chargeback validation.

cost.estimated_savings_source: Prefer cost_report.json or ri_sp_coverage.json modeled savings. Treat Terraform-provided savings percentages as potential until eligibility is verified.
cost.note: Consolidated billing can share volume pricing, Reserved Instance discounts, and Savings Plans within an AWS Organization, subject to sharing preferences and eligibility. Savings depend on service, region, family, tenancy, OS, engine, and commitment coverage.

severity_rules.name: accounts_not_in_discount_sharing_scope
severity_rules.condition: accounts outside consolidated billing or sharing family AND eligible on-demand spend exists
severity_rules.description: Accounts may be missing consolidated billing or discount sharing benefits. Validate legal/billing scope, payer design, Billing Conductor, chargeback, and sharing preferences before changing account structure.

severity_rules.name: discount_sharing_disabled_or_stranded
severity_rules.condition: RI/SP sharing disabled or scoped AND unused commitments coexist with eligible on-demand usage
severity_rules.description: Discount sharing preferences may strand RI/SP benefits while other accounts run eligible on-demand usage. Review sharing preferences and chargeback impact.

severity_rules.name: low_commitment_coverage_candidate
severity_rules.description: Eligible on-demand spend may support new RI/SP purchases. Model term, payment option, utilization risk, and workload stability before purchasing.

severity_rules.name: low_commitment_utilization
severity_rules.description: Existing commitments may be underutilized. Avoid buying more until utilization, account placement, and sharing preferences are fixed.

severity_rules.name: cost_governance_gap
severity_rules.condition: missing owner, cost center, environment, account mapping, or allocation tags for commitment-eligible spend
severity_rules.description: Cost allocation gaps reduce the safety and accuracy of centralized commitment planning.

savings_calculation_priority: Use explicit modeled savings from cost_report.json or ri_sp_coverage.json.
Use eligible on-demand spend multiplied by a documented modeled savings percentage.
Use static estimated_savings_percent only as potential savings.
Do not count new commitment savings unless utilization, eligibility, sharing, and term risk are modeled.

validation_before_change: Check organization membership and billing family scope.
Check RI/SP sharing preferences and exclusions.
Check Billing Conductor, billing transfer, legal entity, and chargeback constraints.
Check commitment eligibility and existing utilization before new purchases.
reporting: Separate coverage opportunity, utilization waste, stranded discounts, and governance gaps.
Report confidence based on account mapping, sharing preference evidence, and RI/SP coverage data.
